title: Minimum Window Substring
problem_statement: Find the smallest substring of s that contains all characters of t.

examples.explanation: "BANC" is the smallest window containing A, B, and C.

constraints: s and t consist of uppercase and lowercase English letters.
intuition: Use a sliding window with character counts and expand/contract to find the smallest valid window.

approaches.name: Two-pointer window with frequency counts
approaches.description: Expand the right pointer until the window is valid, then move the left pointer to shrink it while maintaining validity.
approaches.why_not: Checking every possible window is O(n^2) and too slow.

interview_qa.q: How do you know the window is valid?
interview_qa.a: All required characters are covered when required reaches zero.
Once the current window contains all target characters.
